# function: cidr_last_ip

<!-- Edit here: this is the MarkdownDescription source for the burnham cidr_last_ip function. docs/functions/cidr_last_ip.md is generated from it by "go generate ./..."; do not edit the generated doc. -->

Returns the last address in the CIDR (all host bits set). For IPv4 this is the broadcast address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Last address in a CIDR (broadcast for IPv4).
output "subnet_top" {
  value = provider::burnham::cidr_last_ip("10.0.0.0/24")
  // → "10.0.0.255"
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidr_last_ip(cidr string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `cidr` (String) The CIDR to inspect.
